name: genpark-purchase-intent-scorer-skill
description: GenPark AI Agent Skill - Score visitor purchase intent from behavioral signals (page views, time on site, cart actions, return visits) and trigger personalized interventions.
author: genpark

session.description: Session data: pages_viewed, time_on_site_sec, product_views, cart_adds, search_queries, is_returning.

historical.description: Historical data: past_purchases, past_sessions, days_since_last_visit, avg_order_value.

top_signals.description: Top behavioral signals driving the score.

recommended_interventions.description: Personalized actions to convert the visitor.
